response: Wilmington International Airport is closer to the Atlantic Ocean than Texarkana Regional Airport. Wilmington is located just north of Wilmington, North Carolina, and is approximately 30 km to the east of Taif, Saudi Arabia, and 70 km from Mecca. Texarkana Regional Airport is located in Miller County, Arkansas, and is approximately 3 miles east of State Line Avenue. Therefore, Wilmington International Airport is closer to the Atlantic Ocean.
